subject: Human Resources
title: AI's Impact on Jobs
description: A quick win: understand AI's Impact on Jobs.

hook.text: Goldman Sachs estimates AI could automate 300 million jobs globally.

buildup.text: AI excels at pattern recognition, data analysis, content generation, and repetitive tasks—roles heavy in these are most exposed.

discovery.text: McKinsey found that few entire jobs will be automated—but 60% of jobs have at least 30% of activities that AI can handle.

twist.text: AI doesn't just threaten low-skill jobs—lawyers, radiologists, and analysts face significant automation of core tasks.

climax.text: The likely outcome: job transformation, not elimination.

punchline.text: AI won't replace you. A person using AI will.

quiz.question: According to McKinsey, what percentage of jobs have activities AI can handle?
options: 60% of jobs have at least 30% automatable activities
100% of jobs will be fully automated
Less than 5% of jobs are affected
